Object.Field: LOC.STREET_ADDRESS || NVL2(LOC.POSTAL_CODE,', ' || LOC.POSTAL_CODE,'') || LOC.CITY || NVL2(LOC.STATE_PROVINCE,', ' || LOC.STATE_PROVINCE,'') || NVL2(CNT.COUNTRY_NAME,', ' || CNT.COUNTRY_NAME,'')
